title: Nursery Rhyme. CXXIII. Scholastic.
content:
Speak when you're spoken to,
            Come when one call;
        Shut the door after you,
            And turn to the wall!
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CXXIII. Scholastic."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
